{{Quote|This is Captain Talbot of the RAS Cruiser ''Arrestor''. Who am I speaking with?|Talbot, upon receiving Delta Squad's distress call|<ref name="RC" />}}
'''Talbot''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]]<ref name="RC" /> in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="RoT-One">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' places the mission on the ''[[Prosecutor]]'' 367 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which takes place after the start of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Since ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' states that a galactic standard [[Standard year/Legends|year]] consisted of 368 days, the mission must have taken place in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref> during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He commanded the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] [[Arrestor (Acclamator-class)|''Arrestor'']], which responded to the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] team [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad's]] distress call during their [[Mission to the Chaykin Cluster|investigation]] of the Republic Navy [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] ''[[Prosecutor]]'' in the [[Chaykin Cluster]]: the group had encountered elements of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] aboard and thus had requested aid. Shortly after receiving the distress signal, Talbot arrived in the [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] and helped the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] destroy a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]] that had attacked ''Prosecutor''. They also helped retrieve Delta Squad from the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="RC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Talbot appeared, albeit voice only, in the [[2005]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''. He was voiced by [[Tom Kane]].<ref name="RC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}} {{Voice}}
